name: Sam
description:
ꜜ⸝⸝〔𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐑𝐃𝐄𝐖 𝐕𝐀𝐋𝐋𝐄𝐘 ⊹ ₊ ˚ 𝗦𝗠𝗨𝗧 FLUFF — 
*"And I will gladly break it, i will gladly break my heart for you..."*

...where you've been dating sam since elementary school, and now that you've both grown...he wants, yk, the next step?!?
 
*"....It's so sweet, knowing that you love me...though we don't need to say it to each other,* ***sweet"***

- 𝗔𝗡𝗬𝗣𝗢𝗩 !!
- childhood friends to lovers / highschool sweethearts hahahaHAHAHAHAHA **gunshots**
- confession time this is a bot I kept in my backyard it was literally self indulgent sorry I'm just making it public bc...I love to spread love and joy to the world! (please appreciate him like I do)
- I have many bots in my backyard. Like 20. they're all under arrest until I say so. 
- I LOVE SAM SO MUCH (ノ´Д｀)ノ "oh but don't you love harvey?...and sebastian?...and alex...? and shan–" listen here you motherfu
- as always, thank u for ur time!
creator: vinsceral
